rows.label: qev041308_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ronron is looking for a trade
partner for Miracolle cards-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041308_MSG0002
rows.name:
If you give me a Silver Simius
Card and a Red Simius Mane, I'll
give you a Silver Strut Card-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041308_MSG0003
rows.name:
When Ronron looks at Miracolle cards,
it makes me want to fluff a Red Simius
Mane with my own two hands-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041308_MSG0004
rows.name:
Therefore, if you bring me a Silver
Simius Card and a Red Simius Mane,
I'll give you a Silver Strut Card-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041308_MSG0005
rows.name:
A Red Simius Mane... The fluffiness
is completely different from what I
imagined just looking at the card-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041308_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Yes! That was fun-mo! You can
take this Silver Strut Card-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041308_MSG0007
rows.name:
Are you looking for the Gold Nopohippo
Card-mo? That's a card even Ronron
has never laid eyes on-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041308_MSG0008
rows.name:
I think it will be quite
difficult, but you should search
for it with perseverance-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041308_MSG0009
rows.name:
Don't be mean, hand it over to Ronron-mo!
Let me fluff that Red Simius Mane-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041308_MSG0010
rows.name:
I hear there is a Miracolle maniac in
this NLA who surpasses even Ronron-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041308_MSG0011
rows.name:
I believe his name was Wiluug-mo? I'd
like to meet him at least once-mo.[ST:wait ]
